- [ ] `npm.cmd run smoke`

## OddioAI Review Lenses

- [ ] Source-reference-only policy preserved, no copied or generated song notation
- [ ] Impeccable/Taste UI pass considered for mobile clarity, hierarchy, and copy
- [ ] Every coach joke includes useful correction and a next action
- [ ] Raw audio stays local by default
- [ ] iOS Swift/native impact documented when native behavior changes
